name: Tool Box
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>工</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>作</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>箱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control a monster: You can reveal 2 Equip Spells from your Deck with different names, your opponent randomly picks 1 for you to add to your hand, also place the remaining card on the bottom of your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Tool Box" once per turn.
eff: If you control a monster: You can reveal 2 Equip Spells from your Deck with different names, your opponent randomly picks 1 for you to add to your hand, also place the remaining card on the bottom of your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Tool Box" once per turn.

action: Places cards from the player's Deck on the bottom of the Deck
